sequences.description: Large centered H1 heading 'Shop With Confidence' followed by short paragraph about the Regret-Free Guarantee
sequences.reason: Author can type heading and paragraph normally. Centered alignment is a CSS concern handled by section styling.

sequences.description: Featured promotional teaser with lifestyle image on right, H3 heading 'Beyond the Furniture', description paragraph, and 3 vertical CTA links on left
sequences.reason: Structured split layout with image on one side and text/CTAs on the other requires block structure. Matches commerce-teaser block (featured-right variant).

sequences.description: Grid of 2 items side-by-side, each with large image and linked heading below (Top Drawer Delivery, 3D Room Planning Tool)
sequences.reason: Repeating structured card pattern in a grid layout requires block. Matches cards block with image + linked title per card (no description text).

sequences.description: Featured promotional teaser with text content on left (H3 heading 'Design & Inspiration', description, 3 CTA links) and lifestyle image on right
sequences.reason: Structured split layout with text/CTAs and image side-by-side requires block structure. Matches commerce-teaser block (featured-left variant).

sequences.description: Grid of 2 items side-by-side, each with large image and linked heading below (Free Design Service, Furniture Care)
sequences.reason: Same repeating card pattern as Section 3 - grid of image cards with linked headings. Reuses same cards block variant.

sequences.description: Bold 'Our Regret-Free Guarantee' lead-in followed by long paragraph with multiple inline hyperlinks to service pages
sequences.reason: Author can type a bold lead-in and paragraph with inline links normally. This is standard rich text content.

validatedSections.backgroundAnalysis: Light/white background, content has visible section padding on sides
validatedSections.reason: White background is default page color, no distinct section styling needed

validatedSections.backgroundAnalysis: Light/white background, grid content centered with padding
validatedSections.reason: White background is default page color, no distinct section styling needed

validatedSections.backgroundAnalysis: Light/white background with standard page padding
validatedSections.reason: White background is default page color, no distinct section styling needed

validatedSections.backgroundAnalysis: Light/white background, grid content centered with padding
validatedSections.reason: White background is default page color, no distinct section styling needed

variantDecisions.reason: Existing commerce-teaser-split is dark background with video (45% similarity). This page uses light background with static image and multiple CTAs. New variant created.
No existing cards variants in project. Created new variant for image + linked heading card pattern without description text.

commerce-teaser-featured.description: Split-layout promotional teaser on light background with image, heading, description, and multiple CTAs. Supports featured-left and featured-right layouts via content column ordering.
commerce-teaser-featured.htmlPattern: Single row with 2 columns: image column and content column (heading + description + buttons). Column order determines left/right layout.

cards-linked-image.description: Grid of navigation cards with large images and linked headings. No description body text.
cards-linked-image.htmlPattern: Multiple rows, each row = 1 card. Each card has image column + content column (linked title only).

summary.notes: Page uses a repeating pattern of featured teasers alternating with card grids. All sections have white/light backgrounds with no distinct section styling needed. Two new variants created - no existing variants were similar enough (>70%) to reuse.
